panels.description: Ratio of successful backups to total backup attempts
panels.title: Backup Success Rate

panels.description: Hours since the last successful backup per schedule. Green < 24h, Orange < 48h, Red >= 48h.
panels.title: Hours since last Backup

panels.description: Per-schedule backup success rate sorted worst-first

targets.expr: sum by (schedule) (max without(prometheus_replica) (velero_backup_success_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule", schedule!=""})) / (sum by (schedule) (max without(prometheus_replica) (velero_backup_attempt_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule", schedule!=""})) > 0)

panels.title: Schedules by Backup Success Rate

panels.description: Total backup items and item errors over time
panels.title: Backup Items Total vs Errors

panels.description: Maximum backup duration per schedule over time
panels.title: Backup Duration per Schedule

panels.description: Per-schedule restore success rate sorted worst-first

targets.expr: sum by (schedule) (max without(prometheus_replica) (velero_restore_success_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule", schedule!=""})) / (sum by (schedule) (max without(prometheus_replica) (velero_restore_attempt_total{cluster=~"$cluster", schedule=~"$schedule", schedule!=""})) > 0)

panels.title: Schedules by Restore Success Rate
